Matt Furie’s Hints A Frog Character For New Book Featuring "Strawberry in Bloom"

A Female Pepe Form

About Us

Matt Furie, the artist best known for creating Pepe the Frog, has been working on a new book. He's about to release a female Pepe form called "Strawberry in Bloom".
This character has already been showcased in several art galleries, sparking curiosity and excitement among fans.
According to Furie’s book editor, who goes by the handle @beuys_on_sale on Instagram, Matt especially loves this character. Strawberry In Bloom is set to be the most important figure in the new book, becoming the emotional core of his next chapter.

New Chapter

  • 𝑴𝒂𝒕𝒕 𝑭𝒖𝒓𝒊𝒆’𝒔 iconic frog, Pepe, took the internet by storm - originally a quirky male character that quickly went viral through countless hilarious memes. Years later, it inspired the creation of the $PEPE memecoin, which exploded in 2023, reaching a $10 billion market cap.

  • Get ready for something astrodinary 🐸🌸
